The '''Battle of Manari''' was fought<ref name="DL" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19.5 BBY]]<ref name="Date" /> as part of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and an anti-Republic force<ref name="DL" /> on the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manari]]. [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]] was one of the combatants present, and his [[Roan Shryne's second Padawan|second]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Death/Legends|died]] during the fighting. As a result of his Padawan's death, Shryne changed, becoming disillusioned about the war and losing hope in the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].<ref name="DL" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Manari was first mentioned in ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'', a [[2005]] novel written by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="DL" />
